title: Illustrative UK energy bill dashboard
note: All numbers are fake and intended only for bid/demo visualisation.

archetypes.name: Heat pump + EV household
archetypes.description: Detached family home with electric heating, managed EV charging, and high flexibility.

archetypes.name: Gas boiler, small user
archetypes.description: Compact home with low demand, conventional gas heating, and limited discretionary load.

archetypes.name: Electric-only city flat
archetypes.description: High-density urban flat with direct electric heating and relatively flat demand through the year.

archetypes.name: Hybrid heating suburban family
archetypes.description: Medium-sized suburban household with gas heating, EV charging, and moderate flexibility.

archetypes.name: Large rural heat pump home
archetypes.description: Larger off-gas rural property with strong seasonal demand and higher network exposure.
